children.text: any regional offices or field offices of agencies that are transferred to the Department under this chapter, if such officers are located in the same municipality; and1So in original. Probably should be “offices”.1
portions of regional and field offices of other Federal agencies, to the extent such offices perform functions that are transferred to the Secretary under this chapter.
